concerns.text: The specification omits any requirement to compute bootstrap variance estimates (minimum 1000 iterations) for cleaning‑induced shifts, which is mandated by Constitution Principle VI. Without this, the methodology cannot robustly quantify uncertainty of the observed metric changes.

The idea explicitly calls for summary visualizations (e.g., forest plots, heatmaps) of the cleaning impact. No functional requirement or success criterion in the spec addresses generation of these visualizations.
